description: Allow-list of HIGH/CRITICAL npm-audit advisory IDs known and accepted at HEAD cc32341 (M4 PR-10 baseline). Each entry must specify id (GHSA-*), package, severity, reason, expected_resolution. The CI gate (scripts/audit-check.sh, .github/workflows/ci.yml `npm:audit`) fails when `npm audit --audit-level=high --omit=dev --json` surfaces any HIGH/CRITICAL advisory whose id is not present here. Allow-list entries are time-bounded to M4-close hardening per ADR-0014 Decision 7.

advisories.reason: Transitive via react-router-dom@~6.22.0 (workspace direct dep). Rolls up to HIGH on react-router and react-router-dom. Fix available in react-router-dom 6.30.3 (non-major); evaluating upgrade path against M4-close hardening triage.
Transitive dep; path traversal via percent-encoded dot segments. Fix available (>3.1.0); evaluating upgrade path against M4-close hardening triage.
Transitive dep; host confusion via percent-encoded authority delimiters. Fix available (>3.1.1); evaluating upgrade path against M4-close hardening triage.
